message:
chore: bump workspace version to 0.2.1 for release

Mostly polish since 0.2.0:
- refactor: replace crate-wide clippy allows with per-module lint suppression
- fix: complete per-module clippy lint allows across all crates
- fmt: apply rustfmt across workspace
- ci: bump actions versions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

  "charmed-harmonica",
